data.title: Megabit will launch RONIN/USDT perpetual contract, supporting up to 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will launch RONIN/USDT 1-75 times perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT TIME) on March 10, 2025.

data.title: CNBC: Crypto market volatility increases after Trump signs executive order on strategic Bitcoin reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin fell on Monday, and market sentiment was affected after President Trump signed an executive order to create the U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. The reserve will be funded by bitcoins seized in criminal and civil forfeiture cases, and the U.S. government currently has no plans to buy more bitcoins. Cryptocurrency prices fell after the strategic reserve was announced last week, and investors were disappointed that the plan did not have more offensive measures. (CNBC)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 82,000 USDT with a 4.67% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 10, 2025, 08:22 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 82,000 USDT and is now trading at 81,968.070313 USDT, with a narrowed 4.67% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum Sees Significant Outflow From Centralized Exchanges
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from IntoTheBlock reveals that centralized exchanges experienced a substantial outflow of Ethereum last week, totaling $1.8 billion. This marks the highest weekly outflow since December 2022.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 16
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 16.The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization, to determine whether the market is in an altcoin season or remains Bitcoin-dominated.

data.title: U.S. crypto stocks fell before the market opened, and the ProShares Bitcoin Strategy ETF fell 5.4%
data.description: The U.S. crypto sector fell before the market opened, with the ProShares Bitcoin Strategy ETF down 5.4% and the iShares Bitcoin Trust down 5.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Matrixport: US strategic Bitcoin reserves failed to ignite market sentiment, retail investor enthusiasm remains low
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released today's chart saying that the White House Crypto Summit and the confirmation of the US strategic Bitcoin reserves failed to ignite market sentiment, the crypto market did not show a significant rise, and the perpetual contract funding rate remained at a single-digit level. This shows that retail investors' enthusiasm remains sluggish, in stark contrast to April and December 2024, when funding rates soared to double-digit highs.
Even the market momentum brought by Trump's official inauguration was relatively flat, clearly indicating that Bitcoin still needs a more influential catalyst to usher in a new round of gains.

data.title: Bitcoin Decline Leads To Significant Losses For Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as of March 10, Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, has experienced a substantial unrealized loss of $903 million. This loss stems from the company's acquisition of 51,626 bitcoins throughout 2025, for which it spent approximately $5.15 billion. The decline in Bitcoin's value has significantly impacted the company's investment strategy.

data.title: About $1.8 billion of ETH flowed out of exchanges last week, the highest single-week outflow since December 2022
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data disclosed by IntoTheBlock, about $1.8 billion of ETH flowed out of exchanges last week, the highest single-week outflow since December 2022. Although market pessimism about ETH prices continues, this trend suggests that many holders view current price levels as strategic buying opportunities.

data.title: Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of some assets in the unified account
